message:
feat: Bayesian evidence ledger for pane state classification (wa-1qz1.5)

Log-posterior maintenance over 7 pane states with evidence ledgers,
Bayes factors, Dirichlet prior learning from feedback, and
Gaussian/exponential/categorical likelihood models. 35 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
